headline: Pfizer protects $6.4bn heart disease blockbuster from generics, for now
summary: Pfizer’s Vyndamax will be free from generics competition until 2031 in a boost to the company’s revenue streams.

headline: Clinical Trials Market Analysis/Forecasts 2026-2034 by Phases, Indications, Study Designs, Countries and Competitive Landscape
summary: The clinical trials market is forecasted to experience strong growth, expanding from $92.63 billion to $158.1 billion between 2025 and 2034, driven by rising pharmaceutical and biotechnology R&D, chronic disease prevalence, and demand for innovative treatments. Advances in clinical trial technologies and decentralized models are propelling this growth, alongside challenges like patient recruitment and regulatory complexities. headline: Retatrutide Crosses the Surgical Threshold, but the Real Race Has Just Started
summary: Dallas, TX, April 29, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- PatentVest today released its latest PatentVest Pulse: “The Last 20%: Retatrutide, the Glucagon Paradox, and the Race to Own Surgery-Level Weight Loss Without Surgery.” In April 2026, Eli Lilly’s retatrutide delivered 28.7% mean weight loss, the first non-surgical therapy to match bariatric outcomes. headline: FDA tests out ‘real-time’ clinical trials; AbbVie closes in on a KRAS biotech

headline: Pfizer’s ELREXFIO Significantly Improves Progression-Free Survival for Double-Class Exposed Patients with Relapsed or Refractory Multiple Myeloma
summary: NEW YORK, April 29, 2026--Pfizer Inc. (NYSE: PFE) today announced positive topline results from the Phase 3 MagnetisMM-5 study evaluating ELREXFIO® (elranatamab) as monotherapy in adults with relapsed or refractory multiple myeloma (RRMM) who received at least one prior line of treatment. headline: Relay Therapeutics (RLAY) Falls Hard on Profit-Taking From 74% April Jump
summary: Relay Therapeutics Inc. (NASDAQ:RLAY) is one of the 10 Stocks Reeling From Huge Losses. Relay Therapeutics dropped for a second day on Tuesday, slashing 12.84 percent to finish at $13.03 apiece, as investors appeared to have taken profits after already jumping by 74 percent this month, thanks to positive data from its cancer treatment candidate, […]
